name: review-depth-error-handling
author: diffscope
description: Error-handling and panic-safety benchmark pack for deeper live review runs.

fixtures.name: rust-unwrap-in-request-handler

expected_findings.description: Request handler unwraps user-controlled input and can panic instead of returning a bad-request error.
contains_any: bad request should be handled gracefully

fixtures.description: Request paths should return validation failures instead of panicking on malformed user input.

fixtures.name: go-ignored-error-return

expected_findings.description: Database error is explicitly ignored, so delete failures are silently dropped.

fixtures.description: Go code should not discard important error returns from database operations.

fixtures.name: python-bare-except-silences-error

expected_findings.description: Bare except swallows every exception, including interrupts and unrelated runtime failures.

fixtures.description: Python exception handlers should avoid bare except blocks that hide real failures.

fixtures.name: ts-unhandled-promise-rejection

expected_findings.description: Async call is started without await or catch, so rejections can become unhandled and the job is marked done too early.
contains_any: promise is neither awaited nor caught
job may be marked done before sendWebhook finishes

fixtures.description: Promise-returning work should be awaited or handled so failures are observable.
